_comment: Pa11y base configuration. Committed to the project root.
The chromeLaunchConfig.args entry disables the sandbox for CI runners
that restrict unprivileged user namespaces (GitHub-hosted Ubuntu 24.04).
Deferred AAA findings should be recorded as exception records under
docs/exceptions/ (not added to the ignore list here). The ignore array
is for findings the team has formally accepted as permanent exceptions
_ignoreComment: This rule code is ignored because of a single confirmed pa11y engine limitation, not a real defect. The #status element has a semi-transparent background (rgba(235,156,82,0.16)). Pa11y's engine (HTML_CodeSniffer) cannot composite a semi-transparent background against its backdrop, so it reports a contrast ratio of NaN:1 and fails this rule on #status. axe-core composites alpha correctly and confirms 0 violations, i.e. #status meets the WCAG 2.2 AAA 7:1 contrast requirement. Pa11y's ignore list only supports matching by rule code, not by element selector, so this is the narrowest suppression pa11y allows; it is not a waiver of the 7:1 requirement, and any other element that genuinely fails this rule would be a real regression to catch via axe-core, which remains a required, un-ignored gate. See docs/exceptions/pa11y-alpha-compositing-status.md.
